name: Vortelli's Pizza Delivery
author: Poki
description: Vortelli's Pizza Delivery is a driving game where you need to deliver the pizza on time to eager customers! Are you skilled at reading maps, controlling a speedy car, and thriving under pressure? Now it is your time to shine! Of course, if you prefer, you can also embrace the chaos, drive recklessly, and crash into obstacles. What kind of driver will you be in this high-speed adventure? How to play Vortelli's Pizza Delivery? Move: WASD or the arrow keys Drift: Shift Deliver: Space bar Who created Vortelli's Pizza Delivery? Vortelli's Pizza Delivery is created by Devortel. Play their other game on Poki: Vortelli's Pizza ! How can I play Vortelli's Pizza Delivery for free? You can play Vortelli's Pizza Delivery for free on Poki. Can I play Vortelli's Pizza Delivery on mobile devices and desktop? Vortelli's Pizza Delivery can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
